game_name: World of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck

special_mechanics.name: Cape Attack
special_mechanics.description: Players attack by flourishing their capes. Enemies defeated this way turn into doves, cards, or other harmless objects.

special_mechanics.name: Magic Carpet Flying
special_mechanics.description: After defeating stage bosses, characters learn magic spells allowing traversal abilities including flying on a magic carpet in later levels.

special_mechanics.name: Underwater Air Bubble
special_mechanics.description: Magic spell allowing underwater traversal in an air bubble, enabling gameplay in underwater levels.

special_mechanics.name: Co-op Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: In two-player mode, players can stand on each other's shoulders, use ropes to help each other, and Mickey can pull Donald through gaps he cannot fit through.

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Pathfinding
special_mechanics.description: Mickey can squeeze through certain gaps while Donald must find alternative routes, leading to entirely different realms and stage variations.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented. Game described as 'very easy to complete.' Wikipedia and instruction manual references available but do not contain specific movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel data.
